name: Test Case #3: Open registration page
description: Verifies that clicking the registration link from the Home Page correctly redirects the user to the Signup page with the proper URL and Title.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that clicking the registration link from the Home Page correctly redirects the user to the Signup page with the proper URL and Title.
statusMessage: The URL does not contain '/signup'. Current URL: https://eyouthlearning.com/ar/auth/login?redirect=/join-as-instructor expected [true] but found [false]
